name: reward_circuit
description: Dopamine-like reward prediction circuit. Core of reinforcement learning. Two pathways: (1) REWARD path: RS sensor detects positive outcome → CH burst neuron fires a phasic dopamine signal → strengthens recently-active STDP connections via gated synapses downstream. (2) PREDICTION path: When reward is expected (learned via plastic synapse from context), prediction RS fires → suppresses surprise burst via FS. Result: unexpected reward = big burst (learning signal), expected reward = small burst (no new learning), expected but absent reward = depression (punishment signal from LTS rebound). This is the temporal difference (TD) error signal. Implements: reward-based learning, habit formation, motivation.
